title: USD/JPY — Geopolitical + Carry
text: Middle East escalation drives safe-haven demand — JPY COT LF net short −65,309 (crowded carry). USD/JPY at 158.81; safe-haven bid competes with 450bp Fed-BoJ carry differential. Risk-off flow historically unwinds JPY shorts — watch 157.00 as the first technical level on a sustained risk-off move.

title: AUD/USD — Positioning + Vol
text: AUD LF net long +41,675 (CFTC, week ending Apr 14), long%=72.0% — extreme positioning. HV30 at 6.5%, ATM IV (FXE chain) at 8.2% — options pricing a 1.7 vol-pt premium over realized. AUD/USD at 0.7177; late-trend caution signal as price action stalling. Watch for LF delta turning negative to invalidate.

title: GBP/USD — CB + Technical
text: BoE 4.50% vs Fed 3.75% — 75bp GBP carry premium supports the pair structurally. GBP LF net long +28,426, AM constructive — positioning aligned with the carry read. GBP/USD at 1.3538 mid-range; 1.3600 is the next resistance on a continuation.
